
# Privacy Policy — Darkest Realm

**Last updated:** May 27, 2026
**Contact:** otssicarii@gmail.com

This Privacy Policy describes how the **Darkest Realm** mobile application
("the App", "we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your information.

By installing or using Darkest Realm you agree to the practices described below.
If you do not agree, please do not use the App.

---

## 1. Information We Collect

### 1.1 Automatically generated identifiers
When you first launch the App, we generate an anonymous **device ID** (a random
UUID) that links your in-game progress to your device. This ID:

- Is generated locally on your device
- Is **not tied to your name, email, phone number, or any government identifier**
- Is sent to our servers solely to save and restore your game state
- May be reset by clearing the App's data; doing so will permanently erase your
  in-game progress

### 1.2 Game state data
Your gameplay progress is stored on our servers and may include:

- In-game character name (chosen by you — please do not use real names)
- Selected faction (Humans, Elves, Orcs, Undead)
- Resources, buildings, army composition, and battle history
- Purchase history (which in-app bundles you have unlocked)

### 1.3 Payment data
**We do not see, store, or process your payment card details.** When you
purchase in-app items:

- On **Android via Google Play**, billing is handled entirely by Google Play
  Billing. Google is responsible for handling your card and any saved payment
  methods.
- On **iOS via the App Store**, billing is handled entirely by Apple In-App
  Purchase. Apple is responsible for handling your payment.
- On **web / older builds**, billing is handled by Stripe, Inc. We receive only
  a transaction confirmation and the bundle ID — no card data.

We retain a record of which bundle was credited to your device ID for
fulfillment, refund handling, and tax-reporting purposes.

### 1.4 Diagnostic & crash data
We do **not** currently include third-party analytics SDKs (e.g. Firebase
Analytics, Adjust, AppsFlyer, Facebook SDK). The App may transmit basic crash
logs to our server for stability monitoring — these contain stack traces and
device model only, never personal information.

---

## 2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information described above solely to:

- Provide and maintain the App and your game progress
- Process in-app purchases and credit them to your account
- Detect and prevent fraud, cheating, and abuse
- Comply with legal obligations (e.g. tax records)
- Communicate critical service updates if you have provided a contact method

We do **not** sell or rent your data to any third party for marketing.

---

## 3. Data Sharing

Your device ID and game state are stored on our infrastructure (MongoDB hosted
on Emergent's cloud infrastructure). We share data only with:

- **Google Play Billing** (Android purchases) — only the transaction token
  needed to validate the purchase
- **Apple In-App Purchase** (iOS purchases) — only the receipt needed to
  validate the purchase
- **Stripe, Inc.** (legacy / web purchases) — only the bundle ID and amount
  needed to create a checkout session

These providers have their own privacy policies which govern their handling of
payment data.

---

## 4. Data Retention

We retain your game state and purchase history for as long as your device ID
remains active. If you stop using the App for more than **24 months**, we may
delete your account data.

You may request deletion of your data at any time by emailing
**otssicarii@gmail.com** with your device ID (visible in the App's Profile tab
under "Device ID"). We will erase your data within 30 days.

---

## 5. Children's Privacy

Darkest Realm is rated **Teen** and is not directed to children under 13. We do
not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you
believe a child has provided us with information, contact us and we will delete
it.

---

## 6. Security

We use industry-standard transport encryption (HTTPS / TLS) for all data
transmitted between the App and our servers. While no system is 100% secure,
we take reasonable steps to protect your information from unauthorized access.

---

## 7. Your Rights (GDPR / CCPA)

If you reside in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, California, or
another jurisdiction with similar privacy laws, you have the right to:

- Access the personal data we hold about you
- Request correction of inaccurate data
- Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
- Object to or restrict certain processing
- Receive a copy of your data in a portable format

To exercise these rights, contact **otssicarii@gmail.com**.

---

## 8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of
material changes via an in-app banner. The "Last updated" date at the top
reflects the current version.

---

## 9. Contact

Questions, requests, or complaints about privacy may be sent to:

**otssicarii@gmail.com**

---

*Darkest Realm is operated by an independent developer. This policy is provided
in good faith but does not constitute legal advice. Consult a qualified
attorney for jurisdiction-specific compliance.*
